retrieved_result: My Daily Diet – Foods That I Eat To Help Me Lose Weight And To Sustain Me As An Angry Runner. My Daily Diet – Foods That I Eat To Help Me Lose Weight And To Sustain Me As An Angry Runner. I don’t know about you but I get fucking tired of reading all of the running blogs that recommend you have porridge, granola and bananas for every fucking meal. Here is a list of all of the food I ate today
Decision_Reason: The page discusses diet for weight loss and sustaining a runner, not strategies or guidance to improve overall performance in sports. It is tangential at best and not directly relevant.
